proposed_hypotheses.text: In ds001_breast (n=50000), the marginal mean of pfs_months is approximately 4.7 months with appreciable patient heterogeneity in stage_iv (~30%), has_brain_mets (~10%), er_positive (~70%), her2_positive (~18%), and brca1_mutation/brca2_mutation (~2.5% each).

analyses.result_summary: Overall pfs_months: mean=4.693, median=4.535, sd=2.496. er_positive=0.698, her2_positive=0.181, stage_iv=0.299, has_brain_mets=0.102, tnbc=0.210, hr_pos_her2_neg=0.609, brca1=0.026, brca2=0.024. Treatment use: tamoxifen=0.301, palbociclib=0.349, trastuzumab=0.201, olaparib=0.099, sacituzumab_govitecan=0.100, pembrolizumab=0.152.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Mean pfs_months is lower in patients with stage_iv=1 than stage_iv=0.
Mean pfs_months is lower in patients with has_brain_mets=1 than has_brain_mets=0.
Mean pfs_months is lower in patients with node_positive=1 than node_positive=0.
Mean pfs_months is lower in patients with postmenopausal=1 than postmenopausal=0.
Mean pfs_months is differs in patients with sex_female=1 than sex_female=0.

analyses.result_summary: Mean pfs_months stage_iv=1 vs 0: 3.617 vs 5.153, diff=-1.536, Welch t-test p=0.00e+00.
Mean pfs_months has_brain_mets=1 vs 0: 3.750 vs 4.800, diff=-1.050, Welch t-test p=1.45e-178.
Mean pfs_months node_positive=1 vs 0: 4.681 vs 4.705, diff=-0.024, Welch t-test p=2.92e-01.
Mean pfs_months postmenopausal=1 vs 0: 4.684 vs 4.707, diff=-0.023, Welch t-test p=3.11e-01.
Mean pfs_months sex_female=1 vs 0: 4.686 vs 4.699, diff=-0.013, Welch t-test p=5.62e-01.

proposed_hypotheses.text: pfs_months is positively associated with age_years as a continuous predictor.
pfs_months is negatively associated with ecog_ps as a continuous predictor.
pfs_months is negatively associated with ki67_pct as a continuous predictor.
pfs_months is negatively associated with weight_loss_pct_6mo as a continuous predictor.
pfs_months is negatively associated with tumor_size_cm as a continuous predictor.

analyses.result_summary: Linear regression of pfs_months on age_years: slope=+0.1759, r=+0.702, p=0.00e+00.
Linear regression of pfs_months on ecog_ps: slope=-1.1800, r=-0.320, p=0.00e+00.
Linear regression of pfs_months on ki67_pct: slope=-0.0188, r=-0.091, p=2.98e-93.
Linear regression of pfs_months on weight_loss_pct_6mo: slope=-0.0747, r=-0.116, p=4.07e-148.
Linear regression of pfs_months on tumor_size_cm: slope=+0.0006, r=+0.000, p=9.31e-01.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Mean pfs_months is higher in patients with er_positive=1 vs er_positive=0.
Mean pfs_months is higher in patients with pr_positive=1 vs pr_positive=0.
Mean pfs_months is lower in patients with her2_positive=1 vs her2_positive=0.
Mean pfs_months is higher in patients with her2_low=1 vs her2_low=0.
Mean pfs_months is differs in patients with brca1_mutation=1 vs brca1_mutation=0.
Mean pfs_months is differs in patients with brca2_mutation=1 vs brca2_mutation=0.
Mean pfs_months is lower in patients with pik3ca_mutation=1 vs pik3ca_mutation=0.

Mean pfs_months pr_positive=1 vs 0: 4.824 vs 4.462, diff=+0.362, Welch t-test p=5.82e-59.
Mean pfs_months her2_positive=1 vs 0: 4.317 vs 4.776, diff=-0.459, Welch t-test p=6.10e-70.

Mean pfs_months brca2_mutation=1 vs 0: 4.569 vs 4.696, diff=-0.127, Welch t-test p=8.13e-02.
Mean pfs_months pik3ca_mutation=1 vs 0: 4.328 vs 4.887, diff=-0.559, Welch t-test p=6.07e-144.

proposed_hypotheses.text: pfs_months is positively associated with albumin_g_dl.
pfs_months is negatively associated with ldh_u_l.
pfs_months is negatively associated with crp_mg_l.
pfs_months is negatively associated with nlr.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Mean pfs_months is higher in patients receiving treatment_tamoxifen=1 than treatment_tamoxifen=0 (unadjusted comparison across the full cohort).
Mean pfs_months is higher in patients receiving treatment_palbociclib=1 than treatment_palbociclib=0 (unadjusted comparison across the full cohort).
Mean pfs_months is higher in patients receiving treatment_trastuzumab=1 than treatment_trastuzumab=0 (unadjusted comparison across the full cohort).
Mean pfs_months is higher in patients receiving treatment_olaparib=1 than treatment_olaparib=0 (unadjusted comparison across the full cohort).
Mean pfs_months is higher in patients receiving treatment_sacituzumab_govitecan=1 than treatment_sacituzumab_govitecan=0 (unadjusted comparison across the full cohort).
Mean pfs_months is higher in patients receiving treatment_pembrolizumab=1 than treatment_pembrolizumab=0 (unadjusted comparison across the full cohort).

analyses.result_summary: Mean pfs_months on treatment_tamoxifen=4.723 vs off=4.680, diff=+0.043, Welch t-test p=7.69e-02.
Mean pfs_months on treatment_palbociclib=5.408 vs off=4.310, diff=+1.098, Welch t-test p=0.00e+00.
Mean pfs_months on treatment_trastuzumab=4.645 vs off=4.705, diff=-0.060, Welch t-test p=2.92e-02.
Mean pfs_months on treatment_olaparib=4.660 vs off=4.696, diff=-0.036, Welch t-test p=3.30e-01.
Mean pfs_months on treatment_sacituzumab_govitecan=4.686 vs off=4.694, diff=-0.007, Welch t-test p=8.46e-01.
Mean pfs_months on treatment_pembrolizumab=4.630 vs off=4.704, diff=-0.074, Welch t-test p=1.75e-02.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Adjusted for age_years, ecog_ps, stage_iv, has_brain_mets, albumin_g_dl, ldh_u_l, crp_mg_l, nlr, weight_loss_pct_6mo, and tumor_size_cm, treatment_tamoxifen is positively associated with pfs_months in the full cohort.

Adjusted for age_years, ecog_ps, stage_iv, has_brain_mets, albumin_g_dl, ldh_u_l, crp_mg_l, nlr, weight_loss_pct_6mo, and tumor_size_cm, treatment_palbociclib is positively associated with pfs_months in the full cohort.

Adjusted for age_years, ecog_ps, stage_iv, has_brain_mets, albumin_g_dl, ldh_u_l, crp_mg_l, nlr, weight_loss_pct_6mo, and tumor_size_cm, treatment_trastuzumab is positively associated with pfs_months in the full cohort.

Adjusted for age_years, ecog_ps, stage_iv, has_brain_mets, albumin_g_dl, ldh_u_l, crp_mg_l, nlr, weight_loss_pct_6mo, and tumor_size_cm, treatment_olaparib is positively associated with pfs_months in the full cohort.

Adjusted for age_years, ecog_ps, stage_iv, has_brain_mets, albumin_g_dl, ldh_u_l, crp_mg_l, nlr, weight_loss_pct_6mo, and tumor_size_cm, treatment_sacituzumab_govitecan is positively associated with pfs_months in the full cohort.

Adjusted for age_years, ecog_ps, stage_iv, has_brain_mets, albumin_g_dl, ldh_u_l, crp_mg_l, nlr, weight_loss_pct_6mo, and tumor_size_cm, treatment_pembrolizumab is positively associated with pfs_months in the full cohort.

analyses.result_summary: OLS coefficient on treatment_tamoxifen: +0.001 months PFS (95% CI -0.025 to +0.026), p=9.58e-01.
OLS coefficient on treatment_palbociclib: +1.100 months PFS (95% CI +1.077 to +1.122), p=0.00e+00.
OLS coefficient on treatment_trastuzumab: -0.017 months PFS (95% CI -0.046 to +0.013), p=2.69e-01.
OLS coefficient on treatment_olaparib: -0.027 months PFS (95% CI -0.066 to +0.013), p=1.86e-01.
OLS coefficient on treatment_sacituzumab_govitecan: +0.025 months PFS (95% CI -0.014 to +0.064), p=2.15e-01.
OLS coefficient on treatment_pembrolizumab: -0.032 months PFS (95% CI -0.065 to +0.001), p=5.50e-02.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The pfs_months effect of treatment_tamoxifen differs between patients with er_positive=1 and er_positive=0; specifically, patients with er_positive=1 (the canonical hormone-receptor-positive group) should derive larger PFS benefit from treatment_tamoxifen.

The pfs_months effect of treatment_tamoxifen differs between patients with pr_positive=1 and pr_positive=0; specifically, patients with pr_positive=1 (the canonical hormone-receptor-positive group) should derive larger PFS benefit from treatment_tamoxifen.

analyses.result_summary: Interaction coefficient treatment_tamoxifen:er_positive = -0.005 months PFS (p_interaction = 8.66e-01). Stratified treatment_tamoxifen adjusted coefficient in er_positive=1: -0.002894488820353021 (p=0.8744362560872461); in er_positive=0: 0.0019352118000015787 (p=0.5621867754003296).

Interaction coefficient treatment_tamoxifen:pr_positive = -0.028 months PFS (p_interaction = 2.99e-01). Stratified treatment_tamoxifen adjusted coefficient in pr_positive=1: -0.009704804142608034 (p=0.6020583499183138); in pr_positive=0: 0.019318229127254855 (p=0.1746850069434476).

proposed_hypotheses.text: The pfs_months effect of treatment_trastuzumab differs between patients with her2_positive=1 and her2_positive=0; specifically, treatment_trastuzumab, a HER2-targeted antibody, should produce larger PFS benefit when her2_positive=1.

The pfs_months effect of treatment_trastuzumab differs between patients with her2_low=1 and her2_low=0; specifically, treatment_trastuzumab, a HER2-targeted antibody, should produce larger PFS benefit when her2_low=1.

analyses.result_summary: Interaction coefficient treatment_trastuzumab:her2_positive = +0.017 months PFS (p_interaction = 6.47e-01). Stratified treatment_trastuzumab adjusted coefficient in her2_positive=1: 0.0013884745431559948 (p=0.7916333563497729); in her2_positive=0: -0.015734897539549566 (p=0.38541876734757263).

Interaction coefficient treatment_trastuzumab:her2_low = -0.012 months PFS (p_interaction = 6.97e-01). Stratified treatment_trastuzumab adjusted coefficient in her2_low=1: -0.022666236891351547 (p=0.40303749673174893); in her2_low=0: -0.010870087891616555 (p=0.5371271593448744).

proposed_hypotheses.text: The pfs_months effect of treatment_olaparib differs between patients with brca1_mutation=1 and brca1_mutation=0; specifically, treatment_olaparib (a PARP inhibitor) should produce larger PFS benefit when brca1_mutation=1 (synthetic-lethality biology).

The pfs_months effect of treatment_olaparib differs between patients with brca2_mutation=1 and brca2_mutation=0; specifically, treatment_olaparib (a PARP inhibitor) should produce larger PFS benefit when brca2_mutation=1 (synthetic-lethality biology).

The pfs_months effect of treatment_olaparib differs between patients with brca_any=1 and brca_any=0; specifically, treatment_olaparib (a PARP inhibitor) should produce larger PFS benefit when brca_any=1 (synthetic-lethality biology).

analyses.result_summary: Interaction coefficient treatment_olaparib:brca1_mutation = +0.177 months PFS (p_interaction = 1.73e-01). Stratified treatment_olaparib adjusted coefficient in brca1_mutation=1: 0.14512396136717337 (p=0.2248169944522275); in brca1_mutation=0: -0.031019772700522946 (p=0.12759163259468737).

Interaction coefficient treatment_olaparib:brca2_mutation = -0.043 months PFS (p_interaction = 7.43e-01). Stratified treatment_olaparib adjusted coefficient in brca2_mutation=1: -0.051673478977336436 (p=0.6719729652016613); in brca2_mutation=0: -0.025591441570103755 (p=0.2084798071877284).

Interaction coefficient treatment_olaparib:brca_any = +0.070 months PFS (p_interaction = 4.55e-01). Stratified treatment_olaparib adjusted coefficient in brca_any=1: 0.04124831192471537 (p=0.6288134993275384); in brca_any=0: -0.030178356803439783 (p=0.14381004701067712).

proposed_hypotheses.text: The pfs_months effect of treatment_palbociclib differs between patients with er_positive=1 and er_positive=0; specifically, treatment_palbociclib (a CDK4/6 inhibitor) should produce larger PFS benefit when er_positive=1 (HR+/HER2- biology).

The pfs_months effect of treatment_palbociclib differs between patients with her2_positive=1 and her2_positive=0; specifically, treatment_palbociclib (a CDK4/6 inhibitor) should produce larger PFS benefit when her2_positive=1 (HR+/HER2- biology).

The pfs_months effect of treatment_palbociclib differs between patients with postmenopausal=1 and postmenopausal=0; specifically, treatment_palbociclib (a CDK4/6 inhibitor) should produce larger PFS benefit when postmenopausal=1 (HR+/HER2- biology).

The pfs_months effect of treatment_palbociclib differs between patients with er_pos_her2_neg=1 and er_pos_her2_neg=0; specifically, treatment_palbociclib (a CDK4/6 inhibitor) should produce larger PFS benefit when er_pos_her2_neg=1 (HR+/HER2- biology).

analyses.result_summary: Interaction coefficient treatment_palbociclib:er_positive = +1.576 months PFS (p_interaction = 0.00e+00). Stratified treatment_palbociclib adjusted coefficient in er_positive=1: 1.5731171928342182 (p=0.0); in er_positive=0: -0.003107310002553666 (p=0.3326897315743578).

Interaction coefficient treatment_palbociclib:her2_positive = -1.349 months PFS (p_interaction = 0.00e+00). Stratified treatment_palbociclib adjusted coefficient in her2_positive=1: -0.0011981807715475135 (p=0.7882980192740656); in her2_positive=0: 1.3486652891735322 (p=0.0).

Interaction coefficient treatment_palbociclib:postmenopausal = -0.034 months PFS (p_interaction = 1.53e-01). Stratified treatment_palbociclib adjusted coefficient in postmenopausal=1: 1.0859358137011967 (p=0.0); in postmenopausal=0: 1.119554947811909 (p=0.0).

Interaction coefficient treatment_palbociclib:er_pos_her2_neg = +1.925 months PFS (p_interaction = 0.00e+00). Stratified treatment_palbociclib adjusted coefficient in er_pos_her2_neg=1: 1.9232070693631753 (p=0.0); in er_pos_her2_neg=0: -0.0016220971139815294 (p=0.5656925305328153).

proposed_hypotheses.text: The pfs_months effect of treatment_sacituzumab_govitecan differs between patients with tnbc=1 and tnbc=0; specifically, treatment_sacituzumab_govitecan (a TROP2-directed ADC) should produce larger PFS benefit when tnbc=1 (or, for er_positive=1, smaller benefit).

The pfs_months effect of treatment_sacituzumab_govitecan differs between patients with er_positive=1 and er_positive=0; specifically, treatment_sacituzumab_govitecan (a TROP2-directed ADC) should produce larger PFS benefit when er_positive=1 (or, for er_positive=1, smaller benefit).

The pfs_months effect of treatment_sacituzumab_govitecan differs between patients with her2_low=1 and her2_low=0; specifically, treatment_sacituzumab_govitecan (a TROP2-directed ADC) should produce larger PFS benefit when her2_low=1 (or, for er_positive=1, smaller benefit).

analyses.result_summary: Interaction coefficient treatment_sacituzumab_govitecan:tnbc = -0.031 months PFS (p_interaction = 5.22e-01). Stratified treatment_sacituzumab_govitecan adjusted coefficient in tnbc=1: 0.004511134794037217 (p=0.4644015829841195); in tnbc=0: 0.03538785928423078 (p=0.15836994858950526).

Interaction coefficient treatment_sacituzumab_govitecan:er_positive = +0.029 months PFS (p_interaction = 4.90e-01). Stratified treatment_sacituzumab_govitecan adjusted coefficient in er_positive=1: 0.0366984614481501 (p=0.19246493774073073); in er_positive=0: 0.007350020163993809 (p=0.14593448540198786).

Interaction coefficient treatment_sacituzumab_govitecan:her2_low = +0.028 months PFS (p_interaction = 5.06e-01). Stratified treatment_sacituzumab_govitecan adjusted coefficient in her2_low=1: 0.04306711760809323 (p=0.23256444327263331); in her2_low=0: 0.01528623259195033 (p=0.5171368019371781).

proposed_hypotheses.text: The pfs_months effect of treatment_pembrolizumab differs between patients with tnbc=1 and tnbc=0; specifically, treatment_pembrolizumab (an immune checkpoint inhibitor) should produce larger PFS benefit in tnbc=1 patients (typical TNBC/advanced indications).

The pfs_months effect of treatment_pembrolizumab differs between patients with stage_iv=1 and stage_iv=0; specifically, treatment_pembrolizumab (an immune checkpoint inhibitor) should produce larger PFS benefit in stage_iv=1 patients (typical TNBC/advanced indications).

The pfs_months effect of treatment_pembrolizumab differs between patients with has_brain_mets=1 and has_brain_mets=0; specifically, treatment_pembrolizumab (an immune checkpoint inhibitor) should produce larger PFS benefit in has_brain_mets=1 patients (typical TNBC/advanced indications).

analyses.result_summary: Interaction coefficient treatment_pembrolizumab:tnbc = +0.051 months PFS (p_interaction = 2.09e-01). Stratified treatment_pembrolizumab adjusted coefficient in tnbc=1: 0.007693708703628274 (p=0.14282737701996653); in tnbc=0: -0.043744809997348325 (p=0.03587701339697357).

Interaction coefficient treatment_pembrolizumab:stage_iv = +0.039 months PFS (p_interaction = 2.80e-01). Stratified treatment_pembrolizumab adjusted coefficient in stage_iv=1: -0.004646110498050529 (p=0.8798353970309752); in stage_iv=0: -0.043007234763399224 (p=0.030503825760030228).

Interaction coefficient treatment_pembrolizumab:has_brain_mets = -0.032 months PFS (p_interaction = 5.65e-01). Stratified treatment_pembrolizumab adjusted coefficient in has_brain_mets=1: -0.06320041487170365 (p=0.22081340777237238); in has_brain_mets=0: -0.02878817238023262 (p=0.1029106053554121).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Across the full grid of treatment x biomarker/clinical-feature interactions, any treatment-effect heterogeneity should concentrate in biologically plausible modifiers (HR+ for tamoxifen/palbociclib, HER2+ for trastuzumab, BRCA for olaparib, TNBC for sacituzumab/pembrolizumab); we expect strongly non-zero interactions only for the matched indications.

analyses.result_summary: treatment_palbociclib x er_positive: interaction coefficient +1.576, p_interaction=0.00e+00.
treatment_palbociclib x pr_positive: interaction coefficient +1.040, p_interaction=0.00e+00.
treatment_palbociclib x her2_positive: interaction coefficient -1.349, p_interaction=0.00e+00.
treatment_palbociclib x pik3ca_mutation: interaction coefficient -1.677, p_interaction=0.00e+00.
treatment_palbociclib x tnbc: interaction coefficient -1.391, p_interaction=0.00e+00.
treatment_palbociclib x hr_pos: interaction coefficient +1.482, p_interaction=0.00e+00.
treatment_palbociclib x er_pos_her2_neg: interaction coefficient +1.925, p_interaction=0.00e+00.
treatment_palbociclib x her2_low: interaction coefficient +0.396, p_interaction=9.83e-62.
treatment_palbociclib x brca_any: interaction coefficient -0.159, p_interaction=2.75e-03.
treatment_sacituzumab_govitecan x has_brain_mets: interaction coefficient +0.159, p_interaction=1.76e-02.
treatment_trastuzumab x brca_any: interaction coefficient -0.157, p_interaction=2.32e-02.
treatment_palbociclib x brca2_mutation: interaction coefficient -0.166, p_interaction=2.57e-02.
treatment_pembrolizumab x er_pos_her2_neg: interaction coefficient -0.065, p_interaction=4.73e-02.
treatment_palbociclib x brca1_mutation: interaction coefficient -0.143, p_interaction=5.17e-02.
treatment_trastuzumab x brca2_mutation: interaction coefficient -0.178, p_interaction=6.56e-02.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Within er_positive==1, treatment_tamoxifen is associated with longer pfs_months.
Within her2_positive==1, treatment_trastuzumab is associated with longer pfs_months.
Within (brca1_mutation==1 OR brca2_mutation==1), treatment_olaparib is associated with longer pfs_months.
Within HR+/HER2- (i.e. (er_positive==1 OR pr_positive==1) AND her2_positive==0), treatment_palbociclib is associated with longer pfs_months.
Within TNBC (er_positive==0 AND pr_positive==0 AND her2_positive==0), treatment_sacituzumab_govitecan is associated with longer pfs_months.
Within TNBC, treatment_pembrolizumab is associated with longer pfs_months.

analyses.result_summary: In subgroup defined by er_positive==1 (n=34886), adjusted coefficient on treatment_tamoxifen = -0.003 months PFS (SE 0.018, p=8.74e-01).
In subgroup defined by her2_positive==1 (n=9060), adjusted coefficient on treatment_trastuzumab = +0.001 months PFS (SE 0.005, p=7.92e-01).
In subgroup defined by brca1_mutation==1 or brca2_mutation==1 (n=2499), adjusted coefficient on treatment_olaparib = +0.041 months PFS (SE 0.085, p=6.29e-01).

analyses.code: smf.ols('pfs_months ~ treatment_palbociclib + <covs>', df.query('(er_positive==1 or pr_positive==1) and her2_positive==0')).fit()
analyses.result_summary: In subgroup defined by (er_positive==1 or pr_positive==1) and her2_positive==0 (n=30444), adjusted coefficient on treatment_palbociclib = +1.809 months PFS (SE 0.017, p=0.00e+00).

analyses.code: smf.ols('pfs_months ~ treatment_sacituzumab_govitecan + <covs>', df.query('er_positive==0 and pr_positive==0 and her2_positive==0')).fit()
analyses.result_summary: In subgroup defined by er_positive==0 and pr_positive==0 and her2_positive==0 (n=10496), adjusted coefficient on treatment_sacituzumab_govitecan = +0.005 months PFS (SE 0.006, p=4.64e-01).

analyses.code: smf.ols('pfs_months ~ treatment_pembrolizumab + <covs>', df.query('er_positive==0 and pr_positive==0 and her2_positive==0')).fit()
analyses.result_summary: In subgroup defined by er_positive==0 and pr_positive==0 and her2_positive==0 (n=10496), adjusted coefficient on treatment_pembrolizumab = +0.008 months PFS (SE 0.005, p=1.43e-01).

proposed_hypotheses.text: In a model with the three-way interaction treatment_tamoxifen x er_positive x postmenopausal, the three-way term is non-zero, indicating that the treatment-by-canonical-modifier effect itself depends on the secondary modifier.

In a model with the three-way interaction treatment_palbociclib x hr_pos x postmenopausal, the three-way term is non-zero, indicating that the treatment-by-canonical-modifier effect itself depends on the secondary modifier.

In a model with the three-way interaction treatment_palbociclib x er_pos_her2_neg x postmenopausal, the three-way term is non-zero, indicating that the treatment-by-canonical-modifier effect itself depends on the secondary modifier.

In a model with the three-way interaction treatment_trastuzumab x her2_positive x node_positive, the three-way term is non-zero, indicating that the treatment-by-canonical-modifier effect itself depends on the secondary modifier.

analyses.result_summary: Three-way interaction term (treatment_tamoxifen:er_positive:postmenopausal): coef=-0.0187, p=7.44e-01. Two-way coefficients: treatment_tamoxifen:er_positive=+0.0066(p=8.83e-01); treatment_tamoxifen:postmenopausal=+0.0060(p=9.00e-01)

Three-way interaction term (treatment_palbociclib:hr_pos:postmenopausal): coef=-0.0525, p=3.08e-01. Two-way coefficients: treatment_palbociclib:hr_pos=+1.5133(p=1.96e-309); treatment_palbociclib:postmenopausal=+0.0010(p=9.82e-01)

Three-way interaction term (treatment_palbociclib:er_pos_her2_neg:postmenopausal): coef=-0.0604, p=1.56e-01. Two-way coefficients: treatment_palbociclib:er_pos_her2_neg=+1.9607(p=0.00e+00); treatment_palbociclib:postmenopausal=+0.0006(p=9.85e-01)

Three-way interaction term (treatment_trastuzumab:her2_positive:node_positive): coef=+0.0400, p=5.99e-01. Two-way coefficients: treatment_trastuzumab:her2_positive=-0.0026(p=9.62e-01); treatment_trastuzumab:node_positive=-0.0528(p=1.08e-01)

proposed_hypotheses.text: Within HR+/HER2- AND postmenopausal=1, treatment_palbociclib is associated with longer pfs_months than in patients outside this subgroup (positive joint subgroup effect).
Within ER+/HER2- AND postmenopausal=1, treatment_palbociclib is associated with longer pfs_months.
Within her2_positive=1 AND stage_iv=1, treatment_trastuzumab is associated with longer pfs_months.
Within (brca1_mutation=1 OR brca2_mutation=1), treatment_olaparib is associated with longer pfs_months.
Within TNBC AND stage_iv=1, treatment_sacituzumab_govitecan is associated with longer pfs_months.
Within TNBC AND stage_iv=1, treatment_pembrolizumab is associated with longer pfs_months.
Within ER+ AND PR+ AND postmenopausal=1, treatment_tamoxifen is associated with longer pfs_months.

analyses.code: smf.ols('pfs_months ~ treatment_palbociclib + <covs>', df.query('(er_positive==1 or pr_positive==1) and her2_positive==0 and postmenopausal==1')).fit()

proposed_hypotheses.text: In a multivariable OLS model of pfs_months on age_years, ecog_ps, stage_iv, has_brain_mets, albumin_g_dl, ldh_u_l, crp_mg_l, nlr, weight_loss_pct_6mo, and tumor_size_cm, the dominant prognostic variables are age_years (positive), ecog_ps (negative), stage_iv (negative), has_brain_mets (negative), albumin_g_dl (positive), and weight_loss_pct_6mo (negative).

analyses.result_summary: OLS coefficient on age_years = +0.1756 (p=0.00e+00); model R^2 = 0.712.
OLS coefficient on ecog_ps = -1.1653 (p=0.00e+00); model R^2 = 0.712.
OLS coefficient on stage_iv = -1.5498 (p=0.00e+00); model R^2 = 0.712.
OLS coefficient on has_brain_mets = -0.9890 (p=0.00e+00); model R^2 = 0.712.
OLS coefficient on albumin_g_dl = +0.4808 (p=0.00e+00); model R^2 = 0.712.
OLS coefficient on weight_loss_pct_6mo = -0.0769 (p=0.00e+00); model R^2 = 0.712.

proposed_hypotheses.text: In a single OLS model that includes each treatment crossed with its canonical indication (treatment_tamoxifen*er_positive, treatment_trastuzumab*her2_positive, treatment_olaparib*brca_any, treatment_palbociclib*er_pos_her2_neg, treatment_sacituzumab_govitecan*tnbc, treatment_pembrolizumab*tnbc), only the treatment_palbociclib:er_pos_her2_neg interaction is meaningfully positive; the other treatment-by-canonical-indication interactions are near zero.

analyses.result_summary: Coefficient on treatment_palbociclib:er_pos_her2_neg = +1.924 months PFS (p=0.00e+00); model R^2 = 0.807.
Coefficient on treatment_tamoxifen:er_positive = -0.004 months PFS (p=8.66e-01); model R^2 = 0.807.
Coefficient on treatment_trastuzumab:her2_positive = +0.019 months PFS (p=5.56e-01); model R^2 = 0.807.
Coefficient on treatment_olaparib:brca_any = +0.014 months PFS (p=8.52e-01); model R^2 = 0.807.
Coefficient on treatment_sacituzumab_govitecan:tnbc = -0.008 months PFS (p=8.45e-01); model R^2 = 0.807.
Coefficient on treatment_pembrolizumab:tnbc = +0.036 months PFS (p=2.82e-01); model R^2 = 0.807.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Within the HR+/HER2- subgroup, the treatment_palbociclib treatment effect on pfs_months is further modified by ki67_pct (a non-zero treatment_palbociclib:ki67_pct interaction within the indication subgroup).

Within the HER2+ subgroup, the treatment_trastuzumab treatment effect on pfs_months is further modified by her2_low (a non-zero treatment_trastuzumab:her2_low interaction within the indication subgroup).

Within the BRCA1/2 mut subgroup, the treatment_olaparib treatment effect on pfs_months is further modified by weight_loss_pct_6mo (a non-zero treatment_olaparib:weight_loss_pct_6mo interaction within the indication subgroup).

Within the TNBC subgroup, the treatment_sacituzumab_govitecan treatment effect on pfs_months is further modified by age_years (a non-zero treatment_sacituzumab_govitecan:age_years interaction within the indication subgroup).

Within the TNBC subgroup, the treatment_pembrolizumab treatment effect on pfs_months is further modified by weight_loss_pct_6mo (a non-zero treatment_pembrolizumab:weight_loss_pct_6mo interaction within the indication subgroup).
Within the ER+ subgroup, the treatment_tamoxifen treatment effect on pfs_months is further modified by ldh_u_l (a non-zero treatment_tamoxifen:ldh_u_l interaction within the indication subgroup).

analyses.result_summary: Within HR+/HER2-, treatment_palbociclib:ki67_pct interaction = -0.0851, p=0.00e+00; main treatment_palbociclib (at ki67_pct=0 reference) = +3.1321 (p=0.00e+00).
Within HER2+, treatment_trastuzumab:her2_low interaction = -0.0000, p=0.00e+00; main treatment_trastuzumab (at her2_low=0 reference) = +0.0014 (p=7.92e-01).
Within BRCA1/2 mut, treatment_olaparib:weight_loss_pct_6mo interaction = -0.0420, p=6.09e-02; main treatment_olaparib (at weight_loss_pct_6mo=0 reference) = +0.1956 (p=9.90e-02).
Within TNBC, treatment_sacituzumab_govitecan:age_years interaction = -0.0014, p=2.99e-02; main treatment_sacituzumab_govitecan (at age_years=0 reference) = +0.0934 (p=2.40e-02).
Within TNBC, treatment_pembrolizumab:weight_loss_pct_6mo interaction = +0.0048, p=3.93e-04; main treatment_pembrolizumab (at weight_loss_pct_6mo=0 reference) = -0.0107 (p=1.46e-01).
Within ER+, treatment_tamoxifen:ldh_u_l interaction = -0.0003, p=1.33e-01; main treatment_tamoxifen (at ldh_u_l=0 reference) = +0.0737 (p=1.73e-01).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Within her2_positive=1 AND has_brain_mets=0, treatment_trastuzumab is associated with longer pfs_months.
Within HR+/HER2- AND postmenopausal=1 AND ecog_ps<2, treatment_palbociclib is associated with longer pfs_months.
Within TNBC AND stage_iv=1, treatment_sacituzumab_govitecan is associated with longer pfs_months.
Within TNBC AND stage_iv=1 AND has_brain_mets=0, treatment_pembrolizumab is associated with longer pfs_months.
Within (brca1_mutation=1 OR brca2_mutation=1) AND ecog_ps<2, treatment_olaparib is associated with longer pfs_months.
Within er_positive=1 AND pr_positive=1 AND postmenopausal=1, treatment_tamoxifen is associated with longer pfs_months.

analyses.result_summary: In refined subgroup (her2_positive==1 and has_brain_mets==0, n=8133): adjusted treatment_trastuzumab coefficient = -0.001 (SE 0.005, p=8.29e-01).

In refined subgroup ((er_positive==1 or pr_positive==1) and her2_positive==0 and postmenopausal==1 and ecog_ps < 2, n=15668): adjusted treatment_palbociclib coefficient = +1.786 (SE 0.024, p=0.00e+00).
In refined subgroup (er_positive==0 and pr_positive==0 and her2_positive==0 and stage_iv==1, n=3140): adjusted treatment_sacituzumab_govitecan coefficient = +0.001 (SE 0.016, p=9.51e-01).

In refined subgroup (er_positive==0 and pr_positive==0 and her2_positive==0 and stage_iv==1 and has_brain_mets==0, n=2801): adjusted treatment_pembrolizumab coefficient = +0.022 (SE 0.014, p=1.07e-01).
In refined subgroup ((brca1_mutation==1 or brca2_mutation==1) and ecog_ps < 2, n=2131): adjusted treatment_olaparib coefficient = +0.082 (SE 0.092, p=3.74e-01).
In refined subgroup (er_positive==1 and pr_positive==1 and postmenopausal==1, n=18001): adjusted treatment_tamoxifen coefficient = -0.006 (SE 0.025, p=8.10e-01).

proposed_hypotheses.text: The treatment_palbociclib PFS benefit is concentrated in patients who are HR+ ((er_positive=1 OR pr_positive=1)) AND her2_positive=0 AND pik3ca_mutation=0; in HR+/HER2- patients with pik3ca_mutation=1 the palbociclib benefit is essentially zero, so PIK3CA mutation defines the unfavorable secondary feature that suppresses the treatment effect.
Within HR+/HER2- AND pik3ca_mutation=1, treatment_palbociclib shows no PFS benefit (adjusted coefficient near zero, non-significant).

In a model with the three-way interaction treatment_palbociclib * (HR+/HER2- indicator) * (PIK3CA wild-type indicator), the triple-interaction coefficient is large and positive (~+2.7 months PFS), while the constituent two-way interactions and the palbociclib main effect are near zero — i.e. the entire palbociclib effect lives in the HR+/HER2-/PIK3CA-wt cell.

Within HR+/HER2-, there is a large negative treatment_palbociclib x pik3ca_mutation interaction on pfs_months: the palbociclib benefit (~+2.7 months in PIK3CA-wt) is fully neutralized when pik3ca_mutation=1.

analyses.code: smf.ols('pfs_months ~ treatment_palbociclib + <covs>', df.query('(er_positive==1 or pr_positive==1) and her2_positive==0 and pik3ca_mutation==0')).fit()
analyses.result_summary: In HR+/HER2-/PIK3CA-wt subgroup (n=19918), adjusted treatment_palbociclib coefficient = +2.743 months PFS (SE 0.022, p=0.00e+00).

analyses.code: smf.ols('pfs_months ~ treatment_palbociclib + <covs>', df.query('(er_positive==1 or pr_positive==1) and her2_positive==0 and pik3ca_mutation==1')).fit()
analyses.result_summary: In HR+/HER2-/PIK3CA-mutant subgroup (n=10526), adjusted treatment_palbociclib coefficient = +0.004 months PFS (SE 0.004, p=3.25e-01).

Triple interaction treatment_palbociclib:hr_pos_her2_neg:pik3ca_wt coefficient = +2.741 months PFS (p=0.00e+00). Lower-order palbociclib terms are near zero (palbo main -0.0002 p=9.94e-01; palbo:hr_pos_her2_neg +0.0037 p=9.03e-01; palbo:pik3ca_wt -0.0023 p=9.40e-01).

analyses.code: smf.ols('pfs_months ~ treatment_palbociclib*pik3ca_mutation + <covs>', df.query('(er_positive==1 or pr_positive==1) and her2_positive==0')).fit()
analyses.result_summary: Within HR+/HER2-: treatment_palbociclib main coef = +2.743 (p=0.00e+00), treatment_palbociclib:pik3ca_mutation interaction = -2.739 (p=0.00e+00).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Final treatment-effect-heterogeneity hypothesis for treatment_tamoxifen: across the entire ds001_breast cohort, treatment_tamoxifen has no detectable PFS benefit, even within er_positive=1 AND pr_positive=1 AND postmenopausal=1 (the canonical hormone-receptor-positive subgroup). Direction near zero (slight negative point estimate, non-significant).

Final treatment-effect-heterogeneity hypothesis for treatment_trastuzumab: even within her2_positive=1 (the canonical indication, with or without restricting to has_brain_mets=0 / ecog_ps<2 / stage_iv=1), treatment_trastuzumab has no detectable PFS benefit (adjusted coefficients near zero, non-significant).

Final treatment-effect-heterogeneity hypothesis for treatment_olaparib: within (brca1_mutation=1 OR brca2_mutation=1) — with or without restricting to ecog_ps<2 — treatment_olaparib shows no significant PFS benefit; the point estimate inside this subgroup is small and the formal interaction tx x BRCA is non-significant.

Final treatment-effect-heterogeneity hypothesis for treatment_palbociclib: the PFS benefit of treatment_palbociclib is concentrated in patients who are HR+ ((er_positive=1 OR pr_positive=1)) AND her2_positive=0 AND pik3ca_mutation=0. In this complete subgroup, adjusted PFS is ~+2.74 months longer with palbociclib (p<<0.001). Two unfavorable predicates suppress the effect: her2_positive=1 (eliminates benefit, tx x HER2+ interaction strongly negative), and pik3ca_mutation=1 (eliminates benefit, tx x PIK3CA interaction strongly negative). Within the favorable subgroup, higher ki67_pct further reduces benefit (ki67 tx-interaction = -0.13 months per percent ki67, p<<0.001), but does not abolish it.

Final treatment-effect-heterogeneity hypothesis for treatment_sacituzumab_govitecan: within TNBC (er_positive=0 AND pr_positive=0 AND her2_positive=0), with or without further restriction to stage_iv=1, treatment_sacituzumab_govitecan shows no significant PFS benefit (adjusted coefficient near zero).

Final treatment-effect-heterogeneity hypothesis for treatment_pembrolizumab: within TNBC (er_positive=0 AND pr_positive=0 AND her2_positive=0), with or without further restriction to stage_iv=1 AND has_brain_mets=0, treatment_pembrolizumab shows no significant PFS benefit (adjusted coefficient ~+0.01 to +0.03, non-significant). The unadjusted negative association outside TNBC reflects channelling of pembrolizumab into more advanced disease, not a true harm.

analyses.result_summary: Mean pfs_months by (sub_tam, treatment_tamoxifen) cell: sub=0,tx=0 -> 4.272 (n=10614); sub=0,tx=1 -> 4.354 (n=4500); sub=1,tx=0 -> 4.858 (n=24351); sub=1,tx=1 -> 4.881 (n=10535). In-subgroup raw treatment-on - treatment-off difference = +0.023 months PFS.

Mean pfs_months by (sub_tras, treatment_trastuzumab) cell: sub=0,tx=0 -> 4.786 (n=32791); sub=0,tx=1 -> 4.735 (n=8149); sub=1,tx=0 -> 4.334 (n=7170); sub=1,tx=1 -> 4.254 (n=1890). In-subgroup raw treatment-on - treatment-off difference = -0.079 months PFS.
